scope: ROI batch F (F28-F35) — inference / serving optimization knobs (post-CP1)

items.name: KV cache reuse across personas (same base model)
items.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke (mode=gpu) — prefix-cache before persona LoRA forward
items.blocker: H100 cascade #9 — base_model at /workspace/base_model + persona_lora at /workspace/lora/persona_lora/<id>/

items.name: vLLM PagedAttention integration
items.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: backend_invoke — replace placeholder with vllm.AsyncLLMEngine.generate(...)
items.blocker: H100 cascade #9 + vLLM>=0.6 in pod env (STAGED_FOR_POD; raw#9)

items.name: Speculative decoding (draft 0.5B → target 8B)
items.blocker: Qwen3-0.5B draft weights at /workspace/draft_model_qwen3_0_5b + Qwen3-8B target at /workspace/base_model (cascade #9)
items.expected_impact: 2x latency reduction at identical output distribution

items.name: API layer prompt cache (response memoization)
items.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: handler_persona — check cache before backend_invoke; populate after PASS verdict
items.blocker: pod-side fastapi runtime body must implement LRU cache (STAGED_FOR_POD)
items.expected_impact: Repeat-prompt latency ≈0ms; estimated 20-40% hit rate on benchmark traffic
items.notes: ONLY knob without H100 weight dependency — can be activated first when pod runtime body lands

items.name: Streaming token output (TTFT < 200ms)
items.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa — new endpoint POST /persona/stream alongside /persona; same gate stack
items.blocker: F29 vLLM + pod-side fastapi/uvicorn SSE wiring (bash-nc loop in serve_alm_persona.bash does NOT support chunked transfer)
items.expected_impact: Perceived latency ↓ 5-10x for long generations; TTFT < 200ms target

items.name: fp8 / int8 quantization at serve time
items.blocker: FP16 baseline weights + AN11(a) baseline established + calibration dataset shared/calibration/dest1_calib_512.jsonl
items.expected_impact: 30-50% inference speedup; VRAM ↓ 50%; quality preserved within AN11(a) verified Δ ≤ 0.02

items.name: Dynamic batch scheduling (latency SLO aware)
items.integration_point: tool/serve_alm_persona.hexa :: handler_persona — extract X-Anima-Priority header; vLLM scheduler enforces class quota
items.expected_impact: Fairness across priority classes; throughput ↑ 1.5-2x at fixed P95 SLO

smoke_summary: 8/8 knobs schema-complete; safe_defaults_invariant=true (all enabled=false); requires_weights ⇒ blocked_by_h100 consistency holds for all 7 weight-dependent items
raw_compliance: raw#9  hexa-only (config JSON + spec md + smoke .hexa; no .py)
raw#10 deterministic (no live timestamps inside knob params)
raw#12 실측 only — blocked-by-H100 surfaced honestly via requires_weights flag
raw#15 no-hardcode (knob params live in config SSOT; tool reads from there)
